name: morph-notification-center
description: A notification bell with an unread-count Badge that morphs into a notification centre: the surface springs between the bell and a full drawer while the Button and the Card swap through AnimatePresence, so both get a real enter and exit. Inside, a header (bell, title and a filled unread pill), a list of notifications with tinted semantic icon tiles — the latest unread carrying a highlight surface — and a centred Mark-all-as-read link stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Collapsed, the block is an icon Button whose aria-label spells out the unread count ("Open notifications (3 unread)"), so the count is announced and not conveyed by the dot Badge alone
Expanded, the header bell doubles as the close control with an explicit aria-label, and the title renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page

Each unread row is not marked by the highlight surface alone — it also carries a visually-hidden "(unread)" label; the tinted icon tiles are decorative and aria-hidden so they don't repeat the sender's name
The size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a notification bell that expands into a notification centre or drawer
a shared-element morph from a badge to a notifications panel
an animated notification centre built on ibirdui
